name: chrY_PAR2
description: Pseudoautosomal region 2 (PAR2) at the tip of chrYq and chrXq. ~330 kb of sequence identical (>99.9%) between the two sex chromosomes. Smaller and less obligate-crossover-prone than PAR1 (recombines in ~2% of meioses). Contains 5 genes including IL9R, SPRY3, VAMP7, WASIR1. Same masking convention as PAR1.
expected_copy_count: 2 copies per male genome (chrX and chrY); 2 copies per female genome (both chrX)
